name: ParseMarkers
description: Parse ContextMarkers from recent assistant messages (Layer 5 pre-pass)
actions: Apply recall → load disk content + journal-tail append

name: MaterialisePinnedZone
description: Wrap each pinned tool_result as user-role message envelope (DD-4)
actions: For each pin: synth user message [Pinned earlier output] tool X (round K)...

name: OverflowGate
actions: If prompt fits per-request budget AND pinned_zone <= cap → S6

name: DispatchToolOrLLM
description: Send prompt to LLM or dispatch tool
actions: AI may emit ContextMarkers in next message (loops back via S1)

name: EnterCompaction
description: Compaction triggered (overflow gate OR pinned_zone over cap OR voluntary)

name: Phase1
actions: Build LLMCompactRequest{phase:1, strict:false, priorAnchor, journalUnpinned, dropMarkers, targetTokens}
Choose internalMode: single-pass vs chunk-and-merge by input size

name: Phase2
actions: Build LLMCompactRequest{phase:2, strict:true, priorAnchor, journalAll+pinnedZone, targetTokens=5000}

name: SanityCheck
actions: Check anchor body shape (Markdown only, v1 header, no provider tokens)
If fail → S15 retry; if pass → S17

name: FallbackPath
actions: Else: keepPriorAnchor + truncateJournalFromOldest until prompt fits

name: WriteAnchor
description: Persist new anchor to message stream

name: PostCompactionFitCheck
actions: If Phase 1 result still over budget AND pinned_zone non-empty → S13 (escalate to Phase 2)
If Phase 2 result still over → S19 (unrecoverable)

name: UnrecoverableExit
description: Bounded chain exhausted; raise to runloop (no Phase 3)
actions: Raise E_OVERFLOW_UNRECOVERABLE with user-facing remediation message

name: VoluntarySummarize
actions: Branch to S10 with voluntary flag

name: CompactionDone
description: Return to runloop; back to prompt-build for next round
actions: If voluntary: return tool_result {room_remaining_after, anchor_size, status} to AI
Loop back to S0 for next round
